enrichment.summary: Kyle records a brief vlog from Boulder, mentioning he got up late, watched episodes of Outlander at his mom's house, worked on writing for his job, and plans to do a movie review of Outlander later. The video is casual and rambling with little specific detail.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoys days where he can just focus on writing work
interested enough to plan a review once he finishes watching
